zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II於1162年出生時，他的父親Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg34歲，母親Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen38歲。他於1190年5月2日與Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde在德國史瓦茲包-森德沙奧森結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1236年2月20日在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 薩阿爾福爾-盧道爾斯塔特享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II于1162年出生时，他的父亲Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg34岁，母亲Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen38岁。他于1190年5月2日与Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde在德国史瓦茲包-森德沙奧森结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1236年2月20日在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 薩阿爾福爾-盧道爾斯塔特享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II was born in 1162, his father, Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg, was 34 and his mother, Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen, was 38. He married Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde on 2 May 1190, in Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 20 February 1236, in Saalfeld-Rudolstadt, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II est né en 1162, son père, Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde le 2 mai 1190, à Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1236, à Landkreis Saalfeld-Rudolstadt, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II 1162 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg 34 und seine Mutter Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen 38. Er hat am 2. Mai 1190 in Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Deutschland Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1236 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Landkreis Saalfeld-Rudolstadt, Thüringen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II è nato il nel 1162, il suo padre, Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde il 2 maggio 1190, nel Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1236, nel Landkreis Saalfeld-Rudolstadt, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, IIが1162年に生まれた時，父Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburgは34歳，母Gertrud von Wettin-Meißenは38歳であった。1190年5月2日にドイツスチワーズブルグ-ソンダーシャウセンでGräfin Irmgard von Orlamündeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1236年2月20日にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス サアルフエルド-ルドルスタトで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II(이)가 1162년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1190년 5월 2일 독일 슈워즈버그-손더쇼센에서 Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1236년 2월 20일 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 사알펠드-루도스타드트에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II nasceu em 1162, seu pai, Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde em 2 de maio de 1190, em Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1236, em Landkreis Saalfeld-Rudolstadt, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II родился в 1162 г., его отцу по имени Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde 2 мая 1190 г. в местности щварзбург-сондиршаусен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 20 февраля 1236 г. в местности ландкрис саалфелд-рудолстадт, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 74 лет.

sm.BET 1217 AND 1227: mai le 1217 e o'o I le 1227

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich von Schwarzburg-Käfernburg, II nació en 1162, su papá, Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Gertrud von Wettin-Meißen, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Gräfin Irmgard von Orlamünde el 2 de mayo de 1190, en Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1236, en Landkreis Saalfeld-Rudolstadt, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 74 años.
